resources.string: You can assign another function to the C1 button on the Bluetooth remote control
Allow the app to use Bluetooth for this feature?
"You can pair a Sony remote control via Bluetooth to remotely use functions in %1$s. Tap Pair new controller to start pairing a new device."

If the remote could not be paired with the device, go to Settings and check if the remote is already registered in the Bluetooth device list. If already registered, remove the remote from the list and try pairing it again.
Pairing canceled because Bluetooth was turned off
Pairing failed due to timeout. Try again later.

This device may limit certain functions as a precaution when under intensive use. If you turn on Camera endurance mode, an icon will be displayed to indicate that the app will maintain high performance. When this icon is displayed, you can use the app for a longer period of time.
Camera endurance mode is only available when using %1$s with a remote control connected via Bluetooth. Closing %1$s will disable this function.

The device temperature may increase above typical operating temperature. When the temperature increases a notification and icon will alert you. In this case, don’t hold the device in your hand. Please make sure the remote control is connected via Bluetooth before continuing.
"Device temperature too high. %1$s will shut down temporarily in order to cool down. If you connect a Bluetooth remote control, you can continue to use %1$s with Camera endurance mode."
"Device temperature too high. %1$s will shut down temporarily in order to cool down. If you connect a Bluetooth remote control, you can use %1$s with Camera endurance mode."
To use this function, enable [Use remote control] after pairing a remote control via Bluetooth.
"Device temperature too high. %1$s will shut down temporarily in order to cool down. If you turn on Camera endurance mode, you can use %1$s with a Bluetooth remote control."
"To enable this function, interact with the connected remote control. To cancel, tap EXIT."
"To start pairing, interact with the remote controller. You will receive notifications and dialogs two times. Select PAIR on all of them, then press any key on the paired device to finish pairing."
Throw exception if there are illegal state transition.
Enable fault detection while device is moving
Disable low power mode on high temp.
Save cropped face for eye blink detection.
Execute settings migration at the next launch
Please kill process and relaunch camera after this is changed
You can check the viewfinder from the Vlog Monitor
Note: To use an external mic, please connect it to the Vlog Monitor before recording. If you connect it after, you need to reconnect the Vlog Monitor.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
You have previously accepted the privacy policy but you can always change your mind.
Take a snapshot while recording video
Switch between main and front cameras
To save locations, you have to enable GPS and/or wireless networks. Enable now?
Select the aspect ratio for photos
Set which camera sounds to play, such as when the self-timer is counting down or when focusing. You can also choose to play the shutter sound only.
Photo Pro will close shortly due to inactivity
Make sure that the lens is clean and your finger is not on the lens
Move further away from the object
Photos from Continuous shooting saved in internal storage
Cannot use Continuous shooting with a slow shutter speed
Internal storage full. Save data in SD card instead?
Internal storage is corrupt or write protected. Save data in SD card instead?
SD card full. Save data in internal storage instead?
Cannot use SD card. Save data in internal storage instead?
The following functions are currently disabled.
Please wait for your device to cool down and then restart the camera.
Some features are disabled to prevent increase of device temperature
Assign another function to the AEL button
"By tapping the DISP button, you can show/hide information in the viewfinder. Uncheck any item in this menu if you never want it to be shown when you display information with the DISP button."

"You can re-assign or re-order setting items in the function menu. Tap one of the function items below to assign another function of your choice from the list on the left. Drag and drop any of the function items below to re-order."
You have previously declined the privacy policy.
Not enough battery on the phone. When the battery is low, the camera will close automatically.
Recording stopped due to low battery. Charge your device and try again.
Cannot use camera due to low battery. Charge your device and try again.
The app requires the following permission(s) to perform this action.
"Airplane mode is on. Please turn off Airplane mode from SETTINGS."
"Wi-Fi is turned off and Airplane mode is turned on. Please change these settings by tapping on SETTINGS."
"Wi-Fi is turned off. Please turn on Wi-Fi from SETTINGS."
Not enough internal storage. Continuous shooting stopped. Delete some files to free up storage space.
If you agree below, Sony will collect your personal data to provide customized support and improve devices and services. Sony will handle your data per our Privacy Policy.

You can record videos even in high contrast scene, and make them more dramatic and closer to what you see in real life. Please use supported devices/services to enjoy the content with its original color and brightness.
This setting will optimize the range of values. DRO processing uses a single image, whereas Auto HDR combines multiple exposures to achieve the result.

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
ERROR_CAMERA_DEVICE"

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
ERROR_CAMERA_DISABLED"

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
ERROR_CAMERA_IN_USE"

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
ERROR_CAMERA_SERVICE"
Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
Could not save photos. There may be a problem with the data storage. If Data storage is set to SD card, check your SD card.
Camera will now turn off temporarily to cool down. Your recording will be saved. Restart the app once the device has cooled down.
Memory full. Delete some files from SD card or Internal storage.

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
ERROR_MAX_CAMERAS_IN_USE"
"You can take portrait photos that focus on the face or eyes of people and animals. To change focus targets, tap the face of the subject you would like to focus on."

"You can take videos that focus on the face or eyes of people and animals. To change focus targets, tap the face of the subject you would like to focus on. Note: When this setting is enabled, recording duration may be shortened due to increases in device temperature."
Unlock the screen to use this function
To open the settings, unlock the screen.

"To adjust Bokeh effect, tap the Bokeh icon in the viewfinder and move the slider. This function is supported in Basic (Photo) mode. Make your subjects pop with impressive contrast by blurring the background."
The Drive mode can be changed to use Single or Continuous shooting, or the self-timer.
"When taking photos with the front camera, keep your eyes on the front camera lens near the ear speaker. Your eyes will look in the right direction in the photo."

"You can take portrait photos that focus on the face or eyes of people and animals. To change focus targets, tap the face of the subject you would like to focus on. This function can be enabled or disabled from MENU > Face/Eye AF."

"Turn your palm toward the camera. The self-timer will start counting down when your palm is recognized. To make it easier to detect, extend your fingers upward. To enable this function, switch to the front camera while in Basic (photo) mode and turn on Hand shutter in MENU."

"When using the ultra-wide lens (0.7x), you can select a priority. By selecting Prioritize image quality, you can capture dynamic high-quality images. If you select Prioritize correction for distortion, you can reduce visual distortion. This function is active when taking photos using the ultra-wide lens. After switching to the ultra-wide lens, you can configure the priority from MENU > Ultra-wide lens correction."
"Easily capture an artistic selfie using Bokeh and beauty effects. To use this function, tap More in the viewfinder and select Portrait selfie. Style your selfie and enjoy creative results."
"You can quickly access the web or connect to Wi-Fi by scanning a QR Code. This function is active while in Basic (Photo) mode. This function can be enabled or disabled from MENU > QR Code reader."
Tag your photos and videos with the locations where they were taken. You can change this setting later from MENU > Save location.
You can record a 120 fps slow motion video in HD

"You can easily switch between camera lenses to capture any situation to challenge your creativity. Tap the button in the viewfinder to switch between 0.7x (ultra-wide), 1.0x (wide), 2.9x (telephoto), and 4.4x (telephoto) lenses. You can use this function in both Basic (Photo) and Basic (Video) mode."

"You can easily switch between camera lenses to capture any situation to challenge your creativity. Tap the button in the viewfinder to switch between 0.7x (ultra-wide), 1.0x (wide) and 2.1x (standard) lenses. You can use this function in both Basic (Photo) and Basic (Video) mode."
"Tapping the lens button will display a slider that you can use to adjust the zoom level. You can also pinch the screen or use the volume buttons to zoom."

"Select the file format for still images.
RAW: Requires special software to post-process photos. This allows you to make adjustments while limiting image deterioration. Printable after post-processing. RAW & JPEG: Saves both RAW images requiring post-processing and JPEG images. JPEG: Saves JPEG images.
Notes: RAW format files will always be saved to internal storage with 4:3 aspect ratio. Continuous shooting and Auto HDR are unavailable when RAW or RAW & JPEG is selected."
Set the flash mode to Auto flash, Fill flash, etc.
Set the color of the focus area frame
Save your photos and videos with the locations where they were taken
Set whether or not to display the grid lines to assist you with the composition of images
You can start counting down the self-timer by turning your palm toward the front camera. To make it easier to detect, extend your fingers upward.
Set whether or not to get haptic feedback when interacting with the display, e.g. the mode dial
You can launch Photography Pro by pressing and holding down the device shutter button. This works even if the phone is in sleep mode or locked.

When using the ultra-wide lens, you can select a priority. By selecting Prioritize image quality, you can capture dynamic high-quality images. If you select Prioritize correction for distortion, you can reduce visual distortion.
If necessary, you can calibrate the Level to fix deviations in the tilt direction. Make sure that the camera is horizontal, then select Calibrate.
Recording stopped due to maximum file size limitation or not enough space on SD card
Recording stopped due to maximum recording time limitation
Save current combination of modes and settings?
"Camera settings saved. You can easily recall these settings using the MR shooting mode."

"Select which mic to use while video recording: 1. LR mic: Records stereo sound with left and right microphones (top and bottom when in portrait orientation) 2. Rear mic: Records mono sound with rear microphone"
The camera will automatically detect the type of scene and take photos with auto settings while reducing noise and camera shake.
"In this mode you can take photos using the onscreen shutter button, similar to the usual smartphone camera experience. Use this mode to take selfies, shoot videos, and scan QR Codes."
This will display an explanation of each Shooting mode when changing modes with the mode dial
"Manually control shutter speed and ISO sensitivity. By exposing longer, it is possible to take photos that capture the trailing motion of objects using motion blur."
"Take photos using your saved settings. You can register frequently used combinations of modes and settings."
The camera will control shutter speed automatically, with other settings being left up to you.
"Manually control shutter speed to change how you capture moving objects. Fast shutter speeds will appear to freeze an object in motion, while slow shutter speeds can better capture motion blur."
Drive mode has been automatically set to Single shooting because Transfer & Tagging add-on mode is on
File format has been automatically set to JPEG because Transfer & Tagging add-on mode is on
Cannot use camera in Multi-window or a pop-up window. Close the window and try again. If you are using Multi-window, you can drag the middle of the split bar to make the camera full screen.
Drag the middle of the split bar to switch to full screen %1$s to use
This QR code is not supported
Tap to open \"%1$s\" in your browser
Cannot connect to this Wi-Fi network
Tap to connect to Wi-Fi network \"%1$s\"
"You can quickly access the web or connect to Wi-Fi by scanning a QR Code. This function is active while in Basic (Photo) mode."
Reset Photo Pro to default settings?
Cannot change aspect ratio when the file format is set to RAW
Cannot select auto HDR when Continuous shooting is selected
Cannot select auto HDR when a file format other than JPEG is selected
Bokeh effect is not available with the currently selected lens
Bokeh effect is not available when Transfer & Tagging add-on mode is on
Cannot use \"Continuous shooting: Hi\" with the currently selected lens
Cannot use Continuous shooting while Bokeh effect is on
Continuous shooting is not available when AI super resolution zoom is selected
Cannot use Continuous shooting when a file format other than JPEG is selected
Continuous shooting is not available when Transfer & Tagging add-on is on
Cannot use Flash mode when Continuous shooting is selected
Cannot use Flash mode with the currently selected lens
Cannot use Flashlight with the currently selected lens
Cannot change file format to one other than JPEG when auto HDR is selected
Cannot change file format to one other than JPEG when Continuous shooting is selected
Cannot change file format to one other than JPEG when Transfer & Tagging add-on mode is on
Cannot change this setting while an external mic is connected
This setting does not support the current shutter speed. To configure this setting, change shutter speed to 1 second or less.
Cannot select RAW when an aspect ratio other than 4:3 is selected
Cannot change video size when recording in slow motion. To change this setting exit slow motion mode.
This setting is only available when using the ultra-wide lens
This setting is not available with HDR On. To configure this, turn off HDR.
This setting is not supported for the current video size. To configure this setting, change video size.
Cannot zoom while using Bokeh effect

"Cannot start camera. Restart camera or device.
EVENT_RESUME_TIMEOUT"
The app requires the following permission(s) to perform this action.
To grant permissions, go to App info > Permissions.
To read and save photos and videos
"Choose whether to store photos and videos on your device's internal storage or on an SD card"
Set a self-timer to automatically take a photo after a designated number of seconds have passed
Keep your eyes on the camera
Select the default Shooting mode when launching Photography Pro
Cannot take snapshots when HDR is on
Turn on an effect that makes skin appear smoother

"Select what to adjust when you touch the viewfinder.
Object tracking: The best function for shooting moving objects. It keeps the focus locked on to the object you tapped in the viewfinder, allowing you to shoot moving objects clearly. Autofocus: Tap where you want to focus in the viewfinder. Focus and brightness: Focus on and adjust the brightness of the desired position by tapping the viewfinder."

"Turning on this function will allow Transfer & Tagging add-on to display photos taken with the Xperia camera. Photos will be saved in the internal storage. This function is compatible with photos taken with Photography Pro. Turning on this function will automatically set the file format to JPEG, and the Drive mode to Single shooting."

"Sony is a brand beloved by photographers for producing products that spread the endless joy and wonder of photography. Our experience and technology continues to be chosen by customers around the world.
Photography Pro seeks to recreate the operability and functions of full-scale cameras from Sony Imaging Products. Sony supports your photographic creativity."

"Choose the ideal Shooting mode to match your subject. Next set the shutter speed and exposure. Hold the camera steady from the sides, and take a picture.
Shooting modes include: P (Program auto) S (Shutter speed priority) M (Manual exposure)"

"Select your preferred shooting mode using the mode dial in the top right (top left when in landscape orientation).
With Basic mode, you can easily take photos and videos with the front camera in a way similar to a regular smartphone camera.
With Auto/P/S/M modes, you can access even more advanced settings to take your ideal photos."

"When using Auto/P/S/M modes, firmly hold the camera in landscape orientation and press the shutter button on the upper right hand side of the device to take photos.
Selecting Auto will set functions like shutter speed and exposure automatically.
To configure settings manually, select one of the modes below. P (Program auto) S (Shutter speed priority) M (Manual exposure)"
Cannot use Photo Pro with the connected external display. To use Photo Pro, close the app from the Recent apps screen on your Xperia and then restart it.
Use of camera restricted for security reasons
For stable 4K video recording, you must not change this setting unless you use a high-speed SD card (UHS Speed Class 1 or higher, or Speed Class 10 recommended).
"For stable slow motion video recording, don't change this setting unless you use a high-speed SD card (UHS Speed Class 1 or higher, or Speed Class 10 recommended)."

"For stable video recording, we recommend you change data storage to Internal storage. Would you like to change now?
If you continue to use SD card as data storage, be sure to use a high-speed SD card (UHS Speed Class 1 or higher, or Speed Class 10 recommended)."

"You can select an encoder for 4K video recordings.
H.264 (AVC): Standard format for encoding supported by most devices and services. H.265 (HEVC): Format with a higher compression ratio. Make sure your playback devices or services support this method."
"Select a video size. HDR is unavailable when Full HD (60 fps) or HD are selected."

The Xperia has a unique hybrid stabilization system called Optical SteadyShot - combining optical image stabilization and electronic image stabilization simultaneously. It gives you shake free and smooth videos even when recording on the move.
Assign another function to the volume buttons
Set white balance based on the center of the preview

"Select a zoom setting.
Digital zoom: Zoom using digital processing based on the image sensor data. AI super resolution zoom: Zoom using digital processing that preserves more of the original image quality. Saving photos may take a longer time. This will automatically function as Digital zoom when Continuous shooting is selected."
